title: Anthropic Restores Access to New AI Models

source.title: US government allows Anthropic to release new AI models

segments.title: Restoring Access
segments.audioText: Anthropic says it's restoring access to two new AI models starting today.
segments.transcript: Anthropic says it's restoring access to two new AI models starting today.
segments.translationZh: Anthropic 表示由今日開始，會恢復兩個新 AI 模型嘅使用權限。

points.label: Anthropic says
points.explanationZh: 新聞入面常用 company + says 去交代公司聲明，聽到 says 就準備接重點。

points.label: it's restoring access
points.explanationZh: restoring access 即「恢復使用權限」，it’s 連讀會好快。

points.label: starting today
points.explanationZh: 放句尾表示由今日開始，係時間線索。

segments.title: Commerce Department
segments.audioText: The company says the Commerce Department has lifted its restriction on its Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
segments.transcript: The company says the Commerce Department has lifted its restriction on its Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
segments.translationZh: 公司表示，美國商務部已經取消對 Claude Fable 5 同 Mythos 5 嘅限制。

points.label: The company says
points.explanationZh: The company 代替 Anthropic，避免重複公司名。

points.label: has lifted its restriction
points.explanationZh: has lifted 係「已經取消／解除」；restriction 即限制。

points.label: on its Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5
points.explanationZh: on 後面接受限制嘅對象，呢度係兩個模型名。

segments.title: Government Involvement
segments.audioText: Now the Trump administration is getting involved with AI companies at a really granular level.
segments.transcript: Now the Trump administration is getting involved with AI companies at a really granular level.
segments.translationZh: 而家特朗普政府正以相當細緻嘅層面介入 AI 公司相關事務。

points.label: is getting involved with
points.explanationZh: get involved with 即「介入／參與」，is getting 表示情況正在發展。

points.label: AI companies
points.explanationZh: AI companies 即人工智能公司，新聞會用複數講整個行業。

points.label: at a really granular level
points.explanationZh: granular level 即好細緻、好具體嘅層面；really 令語氣更口語。

sentences: Anthropic says it's restoring access to two new AI models starting today.
The company says the Commerce Department has lifted its restriction on its Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
Now the Trump administration is getting involved with AI companies at a really granular level.

vocabulary.example: The company will restore access to the service today.
vocabulary.translationZh: 公司今日會恢復服務嘅使用權限。

vocabulary.example: Users regained access to the app.
vocabulary.translationZh: 用戶重新攞返 app 嘅使用權限。

vocabulary.example: The new model can handle complex tasks.
vocabulary.translationZh: 新模型可以處理複雜任務。

vocabulary.example: The Commerce Department made the decision.
vocabulary.translationZh: 商務部作出咗呢個決定。

vocabulary.example: The restriction was lifted after a review.
The administration announced a new policy.
vocabulary.translationZh: 政府公布咗一項新政策。

vocabulary.example: The report gives a granular look at the issue.
vocabulary.translationZh: 呢份報告好細緻咁睇呢個問題。

phrases.example: The platform will restore access this week.
Starting today, the new rules are in effect.
Officials decided to lift the restriction.
The city got involved with the project.
We need to review the plan at a granular level.

speakingPractice.promptZh: 由 00:00 開始跟讀第一句，重點練 Anthropic says it’s restoring access 嘅連讀。
重播 00:06，聽寫 Commerce Department has lifted its restriction，再對稿。
用 starting today 練三句：Starting today, I’m checking my schedule earlier.
用兩句英文講返重點：Anthropic is restoring access to two AI models. The government lifted a restriction.

notes: 今日片段係 ABC News 約 2 分 45 秒嘅科技新聞短片，主題係 Anthropic 重新開放兩個 AI 模型。
三句都係開場重點句，先聽公司名、政府部門、動作詞 restore / lift / get involved。
跟讀時留意 restriction on its Claude... 入面 on its 會連住講，唔好逐字停太耐。
dailyLifePractice 會配合「科技工具／帳戶權限」主題，練請同事幫忙、解釋登入問題、同簡短確認更新。

dailyLifePractice.title: Asking for Tech Help
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 你喺公司用唔到一個工具，想請同事幫手睇睇，語氣要自然唔催促。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Hey, do you have a second? I can’t access the dashboard. Let me take a quick look. Thanks, I appreciate it.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Hey, do you have a second?

lines.speaker: Coworker
lines.en: Let me take a quick look.

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: Do you have a second? 係好常見嘅美式開場，唔會太硬。I can’t access... 比 I have no access to... 更口語。

drills.label: substitution
drills.prompt: 用 I can’t access... 換三個工具名。
drills.example: I can’t access the shared folder.

drills.label: quick repeat
drills.prompt: 跟讀 Let me take a quick look. 三次，語氣放鬆。
drills.example: Let me take a quick look.

dailyLifePractice.title: Explaining a Login Problem
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 你登入時出問題，需要簡短同客服或同事講清楚情況。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: I’m trying to log in, but it keeps saying my access is restricted. Could you reset it for me? Sure, I’ll send a reset link.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I’m trying to log in, but it keeps saying my access is restricted.
lines.zh: 我想登入，但佢一直話我嘅權限受限制。

lines.speaker: Support
lines.en: Got it. Is this for your work account?
lines.zh: 明白。呢個係你工作帳戶嗎？

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Yes, it is. Could you reset it for me?
lines.zh: 係呀。可唔可以幫我重設？

lines.speaker: Support
lines.en: Sure, I’ll send a reset link.
lines.zh: 可以，我會寄個重設連結畀你。

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: It keeps saying... 好口語，意思係系統不斷顯示同一個訊息。Could you reset it for me? 禮貌又直接。

drills.label: short response practice
drills.prompt: 對方問 Is this for your work account?，用一句英文回答。

drills.label: polite rephrase
drills.prompt: 將 Reset it. 改成更有禮貌嘅請求。
drills.example: Could you reset it for me?

dailyLifePractice.title: Checking an Update
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 同事話系統有新規則，你想確認由幾時開始同自己要做咩。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Does the new update start today? Yeah, starting today. Do I need to change anything? Just restart the app first.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Does the new update start today?

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Do I need to change anything?

lines.speaker: Coworker
lines.zh: 先重新開個 app 就得。

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: Do I need to change anything? 好實用，適合唔想誤會新安排時用。Just... first 令指示聽落簡單唔嚇人。

drills.label: role-play
drills.prompt: 你做 You，確認一個新安排係咪今日開始。
drills.example: Does the new schedule start today?

drills.label: say-it-your-way
drills.prompt: 用 Just... first 講一個簡單指示。
